title: Kerala High Court grants Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa Bhosle's husband Farmaan Khan transit anticipatory bail
description: The Kerala High Court on Wednesday granted Mohammed Farmaan Khan, the husband of Kumbh Mela fame Monalisa Bhosle, interim protection from arrest for one month in a case registered in Madhya Pradesh on allegations that Bhosle was kidnapped and that the couple's marriage is invalid [Moh Farmaan & Anr. v. State of Kerala & Ors.].Justice Kauser Edappagath said Khan should approach the jurisdictional court in Madhya Pradesh for anticipatory bail. The Court ordered that he shall not be ar
